programme.desc: Euronews is Europe’s leading international news channel. Its mission is to empower people to form their own opinion. Euronews is impartial with a diversity of viewpoints. It is “All Views”. It broadcasts 24/7 and boasts 12 language editions.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Class is in session! Relive all the best moments from everyone’s favourite high school drama. In a world without perfect solutions, the teens of Degrassi learn to deal with challenges as they travel down the complicated road of becoming an adult.

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Contestants earn time by playing grocery pricing games. Then, use that time to run wild through the aisles grabbing everything they can fit into their cart. The team that gathers the most groceries wins!

programme.desc: Explora la Tierra como era antes, donde los depredadores y las presas representan los antiguos rituales de supervivencia, y el pulso de la vida moldea ecosistemas tan ricos y majestuosos como las criaturas que los habitan.
